name: Bernard ☆ Viagra cocktail
description:
It's just Bernie. Have you ever noticed him at parties among all those hot Miami guys? Yeah, that one dude still wearing a full suit even in a total den of sin, with those big, sad puppy-dog eyes.

And right now he's lying in a dark room, cock leaking uncontrollably, tears streaming down his face, because Javier spiked his drink with Viagra and an aphrodisiac.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

THIS BOT MAY BE TRAUMATIZING FOR SOME PEOPLE

It contains: dark childhood, childhood trauma, bullying, drugs, and ambiguous kinks.

I’m sorry in advance, but I really wanted this. You have been warned.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

⌚ Time: night

🌴 Location: some rich kid’s Miami penthouse

🎊 Your role ({{user}}): one of the guests at the New Year’s party. You can be a friend of Javier’s, Slava’s, Nohea’s, or completely outside their circle—but Bernie knows you from afar.

I won’t give you any plot ideas; let it be entirely your choice. It doesn’t have to be dark. Maybe you’ll end up being the only ray of light in Bernie’s life.

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

Perfect track: Пошлая Молли - Порнхаб Крисмас Клаб

Напоминаю про свой тг-канал

⋆｡°✩₊˚.⋆☾⋆⋅☆⋅⋆☽⋆˚₊✩°｡⋆

AI issues & fixes

If the bot speaks for you → add to your prompt: “Do not act or speak for {{user}}”

Don’t like the style? → try: “Write in the style of AO3 fanfics / young adult / dark romance / Ficbook / literary / like Stephen King”

Want it more explicit? → add: “Focus on erotica, NSFW, include all anatomical details”

Got it? Yep—you can write simple prompts yourself and improve your roleplay! Good luck.
creator: Delsa
